LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FREELAND COOPER & FOREMAN LLP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 19, 2014 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FREELAND COOPER & FOREMAN LLP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 19, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FREELAND COOPER & FOREMAN LLP'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. The Elder Abuse Cause of Action is granted without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Continued To Sep-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FREELAND COOPER & FOREMAN LLP's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to September 5, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 19, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/mjm
